THEUNDERSTUDY1_EPOCH.title: Dreamless
THEUNDERSTUDY1_EPOCH.description: The [red]Architect[/red] was a creature of pure order, and order cannot conceive of what cannot exist. He could not [sine]dream[/sine]. Often he struggled to sleep, staring into a dark that never resolved into anything.
THEUNDERSTUDY1_EPOCH.unlockInfo: {IsRevealed:Unlocked|Unlockable} by defeating the Act 1 boss as the Understudy.
THEUNDERSTUDY2_EPOCH.title: Designing an End
THEUNDERSTUDY2_EPOCH.description: One [sine]sleepless[/sine] night, a thought took shape. Creation and deconstruction were equal for him. Life brings death, which brings life, an orderly cycle. If every story requires an ending, then so did his. He resolved to design his own: a final, restful conclusion, and the beginning of a new story in his place.
THEUNDERSTUDY2_EPOCH.unlockInfo: {IsRevealed:Unlocked|Unlockable} by defeating the Act 2 boss as the Understudy.
THEUNDERSTUDY3_EPOCH.title: A Perfect Mirror
THEUNDERSTUDY3_EPOCH.description: The [red]Architect[/red] created a child, and poured his secrets into it - order, design, the shape of every law he knew. In time the child became flawless. A perfect mirror of its maker. A Perfect story.
THEUNDERSTUDY3_EPOCH.unlockInfo: {IsRevealed:Unlocked|Unlockable} by finishing a run as the Understudy.
THEUNDERSTUDY4_EPOCH.title: Consumed
THEUNDERSTUDY4_EPOCH.description: The [purple]blight[/purple] took the child in the space of a breath. Lost in his strange, [sine]dreamless slumber[/sine], the [red]Architect[/red] never noticed that his ending had been unmade.
THEUNDERSTUDY4_EPOCH.unlockInfo: {IsRevealed:Unlocked|Unlockable} by completing a run on Ascension 1 or higher as the Understudy.
THEUNDERSTUDY5_EPOCH.title: Taken
THEUNDERSTUDY5_EPOCH.description: A [sine]distant memory[/sine] surfaced: a child, an ending, the promise of true rest. He could no longer craft a perfect one. So he crept down into the city, into a small bedroom, and carried a [sine]sleeping boy[/sine] to the top of the [gold]Spire[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY5_EPOCH.unlockInfo: {IsRevealed:Unlocked|Unlockable} by defeating 15 Bosses as the Understudy.
THEUNDERSTUDY6_EPOCH.title: Nothing Like Him
THEUNDERSTUDY6_EPOCH.description: The boy was reckless, and loud, and endlessly irritating - nothing like the [red]Architect[/red] at all. But there was potential in him. For years he labored to mold the boy into order, and failed at every turn. Where his caretaker sought design, the boy only wandered off into his [sine]dreams and music[/sine].
THEUNDERSTUDY6_EPOCH.unlockInfo: {IsRevealed:Unlocked|Unlockable} by defeating 15 Elites as the Understudy.
THEUNDERSTUDY7_EPOCH.title: Every Story has a Lesson
THEUNDERSTUDY7_EPOCH.description: One [sine]sleepless[/sine] night, the [red]Architect[/red] decided the time had come for the Final Lesson - which was also the Final Test. He went down to the small bedroom, and asked the boy for one thing: to put an end to his story.
THEUNDERSTUDY7_EPOCH.unlockInfo: {IsRevealed:Unlocked|Unlockable} by defeating the Act 3 boss as the Understudy.
